wrap_tile_sql_has_n:
WITH user_q AS (
SELECT hex_h3res5 AS cell_id, AVG(std_tally) AS value, COUNT(*) AS n FROM bio_obs WHERE species_id = 42 GROUP BY 1
),
cells AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(cell_id AS BIGINT)                 AS _cell,
    value::DOUBLE                           AS value,
    TRY_CAST(n AS BIGINT) AS n
  FROM user_q
  WHERE value IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT isnan(value::DOUBLE)
    AND isfinite(value::DOUBLE)
)
SELECT
  h3_h3_to_string(_cell) AS h3id,
  value,
  n
FROM cells
WHERE h3_cell_to_lng(_cell) BETWEEN -146.3650111852 AND -134.8849888148
  AND h3_cell_to_lat(_cell) BETWEEN 31.8371510528 AND 41.0949092549
LIMIT 50000
wrap_tile_sql_no_n:
WITH user_q AS (
SELECT hex_h3res5 AS cell_id, AVG(temperature) AS value FROM env_obs
),
cells AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(cell_id AS BIGINT)                 AS _cell,
    value::DOUBLE                           AS value,
    NULL::BIGINT AS n
  FROM user_q
  WHERE value IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT isnan(value::DOUBLE)
    AND isfinite(value::DOUBLE)
)
SELECT
  h3_h3_to_string(_cell) AS h3id,
  value,
  n
FROM cells
WHERE h3_cell_to_lng(_cell) BETWEEN -146.2500000000 AND -135.0000000000
  AND h3_cell_to_lat(_cell) BETWEEN 31.9521622380 AND 40.9798980696
LIMIT 50000
wrap_stats_sql:
WITH user_q AS (
SELECT hex_h3res5 AS cell_id, AVG(std_tally) AS value, COUNT(*) AS n FROM bio_obs WHERE species_id = 42 GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  MIN(value::DOUBLE)                           AS min,
  MAX(value::DOUBLE)                           AS max,
  approx_quantile(value::DOUBLE, 0.02)         AS p02,
  approx_quantile(value::DOUBLE, 0.98)         AS p98,
  COUNT(*)                                     AS n
FROM user_q
WHERE value IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT isnan(value::DOUBLE)
  AND isfinite(value::DOUBLE)
